mfaDisabledDescription: MFA je trenutno onemogočena. Omogočite jo za dodaten sloj varnosti vašega računa.
mfaEnabledDescription: MFA je trenutno omogočena. Vaš račun je zaščiten z dvofaktorsko avtentikacijo.
mfaSetupInstructions: Skenirajte spodnjo QR kodo z vašo aplikacijo za avtentikacijo (Google Authenticator, Authy itd.) ali ročno vnesite skrivnost:
mfaDisableConfirmation: Ali ste prepričani, da želite onemogočiti MFA? To bo zmanjšalo varnost vašega računa.
backupCodesModalDescription: Shranite te rezervne kode na varno mesto. Vsako kodo lahko uporabite samo enkrat za prijavo, če izgubite dostop do aplikacije za preverjanje pristnosti.
backupCodesWarningMessage: Te kode bodo prikazane samo enkrat. Shranite jih varno - pozneje jih ne boste mogli pridobiti.
backupCodesSaveConfirmation: Te kode sem shranil na varno mesto
errorRegenerateBackupCodes: Napaka pri ponovnem ustvarjanju rezervnih kod
errorLoadBackupCodeStatus: Napaka pri nalaganju statusa rezervnih kod
linkedAccountsDescription: Manage external authentication providers (SSO) linked to your account. You can sign in using any of these providers.
unlinkModalConfirmation: Are you sure you want to unlink your {providerName} account? You will no longer be able to sign in using this provider.
unlinkModalLastMethodWarning: Warning: This is your only authentication method. Please set a password before unlinking.
unlinkAccountLastMethodError: Cannot unlink last authentication method. Please set a password first.
linkAccountRateLimitError: Too many link attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
linkAccountInUse: This {providerName} account is already linked to another user
apiKeysDescription: Manage API keys for third-party integrations (e.g. FitoTrack, WorkOutDoors). Keys never expire unless you set an expiration date.
apiKeyRevealDescription: Copy your API key now — it will not be shown again.
apiKeyRevealWarning: Store this key securely. Anyone with this key can access your account with the selected permissions.
apiKeyRevealConfirmation: I have saved this key in a secure location
apiKeyRevokeConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to revoke the key
apiKeyDeleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the key
